rulings.Case Title: KAZUKO K. ARTUS VS. GRAMERCY TOWERS CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION, A ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Petition For Writ Of Mandate
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 7, 2022 line 1. PETITIONER KAZUKO ARTUS Notice Of Petition For Writ Of Mandate Petitioner's Petition for Writ of Mandate is continued to February 14, 2022 to allow the settlement process to complete per December 29, 2021 minute order. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: WEI-SHING SU VS. KOREY ERGUR ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Plaintiff'S Motion For A Preliminary Injunction Against Defendants Koray Ergur And Byft Llc
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 7, 2022 line 3. Notice Of Plaintiff'S Motion For A Preliminary Injunction Against Defendants Koray Ergur And Byft Llc Plaintiff's Motion for Preliminary Injunction is continued to February 18, 2021. Moving party to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers per SFLR 2.7B no later than February 8, 2022 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. rulings.Case Title: THIRD 3101 LP, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED PARTNERSHIP VS. IMMERSIVE ENVIRONMENTS, LLC, A DELAWARE LIMITED ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Portions Of Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 7, 2022 line 4. Plaintiff'S Notice Of Motion And Motion To Seal Portions Of Complaint Plaintiff's Motion to Seal Portions of Complaint is GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is GRANTED as to paragraphs 11, 12, 13, 16, 17, and 19. Motion is DENIED as to paragraphs 14 and 20. Motion is also denied as to the request to seal the entirety of the Settlement Agreement without prejudice. This request is not narrowly tailored to protect parties' overriding interests. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303; or Phone Dial in: (415) 762-9988; Webinar ID: 836 2280 0051; Password: 613303). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.
